summary: Gwanak went DPK in both subs (유기홍 갑 55.92, 정태호 을 53.90). 갑's 2020 runner-up was 김성식 (independent, 33.55%) — unusual prominence for an independent in Seoul. SNU + progressive student-cultural base anchored.

issues.label: SNU university base
issues.description: SNU presence and Shinrim student culture produce reliably progressive electorate.

issues.label: Progressive identity
issues.description: Long-standing left-leaning culture, 1980s movement alumni networks.

issues.label: Independent runner-up (2020 갑)
issues.description: 김성식's 33.55% as independent is unusual; signals minor-party fluidity.
